plan_aliases: Bajaj Allianz General Insurance Co. Ltd.

coverages.coverage_type: inpatient | daycare | outpatient | maternity | domiciliary | organ-donor | ayush | other

benefits.name: Accident
benefits.description: sudden, unforeseen and involuntary event caused by external, visible and violent means.

benefits.name: Any one Illness
benefits.description: continuous Period of Illness and it includes relapse within 45 days from the date of last consultation with the Hospital/Nursing Home where treatment was taken.

benefits.name: AYUSH Hospital
benefits.description: healthcare facility wherein medical/surgical/para-surgical treatment procedures and interventions are carried out by AYUSH Medical Practitioner(s).

benefits.name: AYUSH Day Care Centre
benefits.description: health centre which is registered with the local authorities, wherever applicable and having facilities for carrying out treatment procedures and medical or surgical/para-surgical interventions or both under the supervision of registered AYUSH Medical Practitioner(s) on Day Care Treatment basis without Inpatient services.

exclusions.name: Congenital Anomaly
exclusions.description: condition which is present since birth, and which is abnormal with reference to form, structure or position.

exclusions.name: Dental Treatment
exclusions.description: treatment related to teeth or structures supporting teeth including examinations, fillings (where appropriate), crowns, extractions and surgery.
